summary: Backend regression for OpsFlow Changes 1-6 + health/WS. 15/15 pytest cases passed against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Covered: resolve/reopen + activity_history, junk email filter (block + allowlist), analytics internal-brand exclusion (summary, brand-frequency, issues-by-client, tat-by-client), period filters (1w<=1m<=1y<=all), hybrid issue classifier (Delay/TAT, Other, Webhook), display_message strip + raw full_message preservation, WebSocket broadcast of ticket_resolved + ticket_reopened.

minor.issue: When called on a non-resolved ticket, the route still returns 200 with a 'reopen' route alias although service correctly skips state transition. Behavior is correct but route name is slightly misleading; consider 'comment' endpoint for that path. Functional behavior verified.
DELETE /api/tickets/{id} not exposed (tests gracefully ignore). Cleanup of TEST_ prefixed tickets relies on this; main agent may want to expose a delete route or admin cleanup.

action_items: (Optional) Expose DELETE /api/tickets/{id} or admin cleanup endpoint for TEST_ data hygiene.
(Cleanup) /app/backend/server.py still contains ~200 lines of commented-out legacy code at top — recommend removing.
(Cleanup) /app/backend/routes/tickets.py top has ~48 lines of commented-out legacy code.
(Hardening) classify_issue_type_hybrid silently swallows all exceptions; consider logging at WARNING when LLM call fails so prod can detect API key/quota issues.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: large commented-out blocks (lines 1-217) hurt readability; safe to delete.
ticket_service.serialize_ticket() builds display_message every time on read — fine for small payloads but consider caching it at write-time for very large full_message documents.
analytics.parse_date_filter() returns (None, now) when period is unrecognized; an unknown 'period' value silently falls back to all-time. Consider 400 for invalid period values.
Two AsyncIOMotorClient instances are created (server.py + ticket_service.py) — minor resource duplication, consider injecting a single client via dependency.
seed_data_creation: Tests create transient TEST_ prefixed tickets (BrandReopen, BrandOpenOnly, BrandWS). Cleanup via DELETE is best-effort; endpoint may not exist so a few TEST_ tickets may remain in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_opsflow_changes.py -v . All 15 cases cover Changes 1-6 + WS + Health. BASE_URL is read from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Tests are idempotent and create/delete (best-effort) their own data; they do not depend on the pre-seeded 100 tickets but do verify Blitznow/#bug-reporting/Testing brands are excluded from analytics.
